capabilities.name: filesystem
capabilities.description: Full read, write, and edit capabilities on the local filesystem.

capabilities.name: process_management
capabilities.description: Control of system services via systemd.

capabilities.name: python_environment
capabilities.description: Creation of virtual environments and installation of packages.

capabilities.name: git_local
capabilities.description: Management of a local git repository, including fetch and reset.

limits.name: git_remote
limits.description: Cannot push to or pull from remote git repositories that require authentication. This is a security boundary.

limits.name: github_actions
limits.description: Cannot directly create or modify GitHub Actions workflows in the remote repository. Can only write the files to the local filesystem.

limits.name: interactive_prompts
limits.description: Cannot respond to interactive prompts from scripts unless they can be bypassed with flags (like --force) or input can be piped.
